title: Extension.js Dev Session Readiness Contract (ready.json)
description: The per-session runtime contract written to dist/extension-js/<browser>/ready.json by the dev server (producer: programs/develop/plugin-playwright). Polled by `extension wait` / `extension_wait` and read by every other bridge tool for discovery. NOTE: this is the RUNTIME session contract — distinct from docs/readiness/readiness.schema.json, which is the CI build VERDICT for isextensionready.com. v2 adds the control-channel discovery fields (controlPort/instanceId/logsPath).

schemaVersion.description: Bumped from implicit v1 when the control-channel fields were added. Routed through the schema-drift guard.

status.description: starting → ready on first successful compile; error on compile/launch failure.

browser.description: Resolved browser key, e.g. chrome, edge, firefox, chromium-based.

runId.description: Unique per `extension dev` run. Matches log-event.runId and the control `ready.runId`.

port.description: The rspack dev-server port (HMR /ws). NOT the control channel — see controlPort.

instanceId.description: v2. Per-session shared secret (baked into the sidecar as __INSTANCE_ID__). Required on every control-WS hello.

controlPort.description: v2. Dedicated control WebSocket port (≠ rspack `port`). null when no control channel (e.g. --no-browser with no sidecar).

controlPath.description: v2. Path of the control WS endpoint.

logsPath.description: v2. Explicit relative path to logs.ndjson so file-reading agents don't guess, e.g. dist/extension-js/chrome/logs.ndjson.
